title: FLUX.1 Schnell — Text to Image

fields.name: prompt
fields.title: Prompt
fields.description: Text prompt describing the desired output.

fields.name: steps
fields.title: Steps
fields.description: Number of inference steps. Leave unset for the model default.

fields.name: guidance_scale
fields.title: Guidance Scale
fields.description: How strongly to follow the prompt. Leave unset for the default.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Set for reproducible output; leave unset for random.

fields.name: negative_prompt
fields.title: Negative Prompt
fields.description: Describe what to avoid. Ignored by models that don't support it.
